summary: The diff shows that a migration module was added and main.mo was modified to integrate it, but does not contain any seed data implementation. All 9 requirements (REQ-91 through REQ-99) requesting population of database tables with at least 50 records each are missing from the implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Expand the backend/ingredient-store.mo ingredient database to contain at least 50 valid ingredient records with complete information
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to ingredient-store.mo are present in the diff, and no seed data initialization for ingredients is visible

missing_requirements.requirement: Expand the product database in backend/main.mo to contain at least 50 valid product records
missing_requirements.reason: No product seed data population is visible in main.mo. The skincareProducts array remains empty and no initialization logic is present

missing_requirements.requirement: Create seed data initialization in backend/main.mo that populates the users table with at least 50 valid test user records
missing_requirements.reason: No user seed data generation or initialization logic is present in the modified main.mo

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate seed data for the skin_type_results table with at least 50 valid analysis records linked to seed users
missing_requirements.reason: No seed data for skin type results is present. The skinTypeStore remains an empty Map with no initialization

missing_requirements.requirement: Create seed data for the favorites table with at least 50 valid favorite records
missing_requirements.reason: No favorites seed data initialization is present. The favorites Map remains empty

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate seed data for the routines table with at least 50 valid routine records
missing_requirements.reason: No routines seed data is present. The routines Map remains empty with no initialization logic

missing_requirements.requirement: Create seed data for the product_notes table with at least 50 valid product note records
missing_requirements.reason: No product notes seed data is present. The productNotes Map remains empty

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate seed data for the analysis_history table with at least 50 valid analysis history records
missing_requirements.reason: No analysis history seed data is visible. No multi-entry temporal data initialization is present

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement a backend admin function or initialization routine that populates all database tables with complete seed data sets
missing_requirements.reason: No admin initialization function is present in the diff. The migration module only defines types and a pass-through run function without seed data logic

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module with data structure type definitions
hallucinated_features.reason: A migration.mo file was added that defines OldActor and NewActor types with a run function that returns old data unchanged. This migration infrastructure was not requested in the BuildRequest, which specifically asked for seed data population, not migration logic
